Overview Personal Logs

Personal Logs

System Status: Running

Sprint 2021 - Competitive Programming Fundamentals

Goal: Understand CP fundamentals

Delivered
  • Learned Pascal (My First Language)
  • Learned C++
  • Learned basic competitive techniques

Retrospective: This sprint sets the foundation for my programming journey.

Sprint 2022 - Intermediate Competitive Programming

Goal: Improve CP skills

Delivered
  • Learned intermediate competitive techniques
  • Improved CP skills
  • Started participating in CP contests

Retrospective: CP is hard.

Sprint 2023 - Advanced Competitive Programming

Goal: Win a whole lot of contests

Delivered
  • Learned advanced competitive techniques
  • Did a lot of contests
  • Won 3 contests

Retrospective: CP is really really hard.

Sprint 2024 - Changing Paradigm

Goal: Move from coding for O(n) to coding for providing value

Delivered
  • Learned Java
  • Learned OOP
  • Started incorporating SOLID, DRY, KISS principles

Retrospective: Don't fall into abstraction hell!

Sprint 2025 - Starting to Go Deep

Goal: Go deep on something & land clients

Delivered
  • Focused on full-stack depth
  • Chooses Next.js as my main stack
  • Landed 4 clients with repeat orders

Retrospective: I learn & build faster when there's money or reputation on the line.

Sprint 2026 - Optimization Sprint

Active

Goal: Compound skills and revenue

In Progress
  • Agency traction and stability
  • Strengthening PM & System Designing skills
  • Leveraging swarm intelligence into my work
